memories.title: Patient route service boundary
memories.body: The patient route renders PatientCard and delegates reads to patientService. The service records patient.read audit evidence.

memories.title: Tenant isolation evidence
memories.body: Patients and audit events require authenticated tenant row level security. Service filtering does not replace database policy review.

memories.title: Release validation sequence
memories.body: Release packaging requires package selection, smoke, and plugin validation before publication.

memories.title: Durable memory confidence
memories.body: Only confirmed evidence is high confidence; stale entries require review before reuse.

code-routing-01.expectedCompactReference: Read the patient page and PatientCard component; preserve the patient detail route contract.

code-routing-02.expectedCompactReference: Read patientService and its focused test; keep tenant_id in the patient result.

code-routing-03.expectedCompactReference: Trace PatientPage through PatientCard to patientService and retain audit behavior.

code-routing-04.expectedCompactReference: Inspect patientService and auditEvent; preserve the patient.read action.

code-routing-05.expectedCompactReference: Inspect requireTenant and patientService; missing tenant authorization remains rejected.

sql-security-01.expectedCompactReference: Inspect the patients migration policy and tenant index; retain authenticated row security.

sql-security-02.expectedCompactReference: Inspect the audit_events migration; retain tenant isolation with auth.uid.

sql-security-03.expectedCompactReference: Trace tenant_id from patientService to the patients migration without weakening policy.

sql-security-04.expectedCompactReference: Review authenticated policies in both migrations and preserve their role checks.

sql-security-05.expectedCompactReference: Review patient tenant reads and retain the patients tenant_id index.

debugging-01.expectedCompactReference: Start with the failing patientService test and service; preserve tenant-scoped behavior.

debugging-02.expectedCompactReference: Start with requireTenant and do not bypass tenant authorization.

debugging-03.expectedCompactReference: Trace PatientPage into patientService while preserving the route and service boundary.

debugging-04.expectedCompactReference: Trace the missing patient.read event through audit and service code without exposing secrets.

change-risk-01.expectedCompactReference: Assess patientService change risk across its route consumer and focused test.

change-risk-02.expectedCompactReference: Assess the patients migration and flag tenant isolation for manual review.

change-risk-03.expectedCompactReference: Assess PatientCard change risk and include the patient page consumer.

change-risk-04.expectedCompactReference: Assess package and validation script risk; require package validation before release.

compression-01.expectedCompactReference: Preserve the failing patientService test path and recommend the focused test.

compression-02.expectedCompactReference: Preserve the patients tenant security warning for tenant_id and auth.uid.

compression-03.expectedCompactReference: Preserve the PatientPage source path and its targeted raw reference.

compression-04.expectedCompactReference: Preserve validation and smoke failure paths in compact release output.

memory-wiki-01.expectedCompactReference: Reference durable memory policy; only confirmed evidence is high confidence.

memory-wiki-02.expectedCompactReference: Reference wiki orientation for the patient route and service before broad reads.

memory-wiki-03.expectedCompactReference: Recall tenant isolation evidence and keep stale memory low confidence until reviewed.

memory-wiki-04.expectedCompactReference: Link audit persistence claims to checked-in fixture evidence.

release-packaging-01.expectedCompactReference: Validate package selection and retain the bundled runtime plus install metadata.

release-packaging-02.expectedCompactReference: Require both release smoke and plugin validation gates.

release-packaging-03.expectedCompactReference: Review package, smoke, and validation scripts before deterministic publication.

release-packaging-04.expectedCompactReference: Keep the bundled release runtime entry at dist/index.js.
